---
title: "All-in-One Guide: Open & Reproducible Research"
description: "A single consolidated version of Chapters 1–10."
---

include:

chapters/index.qmd
chapters/01-why-open.qmd
chapters/02-fair-basics.qmd
chapters/03-project-mgmt.qmd
chapters/04-dmp.qmd
chapters/05-organise-tidy.qmd
chapters/06-docs-eln-sops.qmd
chapters/07-code-quality-testing.qmd
chapters/08-s-responsibility.qmd
chapters/09-automation.qmd
chapters/10-publishing-pids.qmd
chapters/11-wrap-up.qmd
chapters/resources.qmd
chapters/references.qmd
